text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The annual summer camp has begun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove tells Narita Brian that Biwa Hayahide
will be joining the camp later than everyone else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove lets it slip that Hayahide's been held
back by a comprehensive physical but doesn't go
into more detail, leaving Narita Brian uneasy.
